SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractTemplatingEngineAdapter
Provides abstractions around the template engine adapter interface, for reuse by implementers.
AnnotationType
 
ClientModificationFeature
Defines a general set of modifications supported by a generated client.
Context<TSpecDocument>
The Context used for generation.
DataTypeFeature
Defines common data types supported by a generator.
DocumentationFeature
Defines the documentation type available in generated output.
FeatureSet
Defines the feature set for a target generator.
FeatureSet.Builder
FeatureSet builder static inner class.
FeatureSet.FeatureSetFlattened
Displays a flattened or "normalized" view of the featureSet.
GeneratorMetadata
Represents metadata about a generator.
GeneratorMetadata.Builder
GeneratorMetadata builder static inner class.
GeneratorSettings
Represents those settings applied to a generator.
GeneratorSettings.Builder
GeneratorSettings builder static inner class.
GenericValidator<TInput>
A generic implementation of a validator instance which simply applies rules to an input instance.
GlobalFeature
Defines a set of globally available features.
Invalid
Represents a Validated state which is "Invalid" to some degree of Severity.
OAS2
 
OAS3
 
ParameterFeature
Defines parameters supported by endpoints in the generated code.
SchemaSupportFeature
Defines special circumstances handled by the generator.
SecurityFeature
Defines security features supported in the generated code.
Severity
Defines different levels of severity to be used during validation.
Stability
Represents the "stability index" of a generator or feature, based on the stability indexes defined in the node.js ecosystem.
TemplateDefinition
TemplateDefinition is a type which defines the basics of a template file and target output location.
TemplateFileType
Represents the type of a generator's templating files.
TemplateFileType.Constants
 
TemplatePathLocator
Provides means for searching for "actual" template location based on relative template file.
TemplateProcessor
Interface for abstractions around writing templated data to a file.
TemplatingEngineAdapter
Each templating engine is called by an Adapter, selected at runtime
TemplatingExecutor
interface to the full template content implementers might take into account the -t cli option, look in the resources for a generator specific template, etc
TemplatingGenerator
Deprecated.
as of 5.0, replaced by TemplatingExecutor.
ToolingExtension
 
Valid
Represents a Validated state which is "valid" according to the defined rule.
Validated
Provides details about the state of a completed validation.
ValidationResult
Encapsulates details about the result of a validation test.
ValidationRule
Defines a rule to be evaluated against some target object.
ValidationRule.Fail
 
ValidationRule.Pass
 
ValidationRule.Result
 
Validator<TInput>
Defines a contract allowing some input to be validated.
WireFormatFeature
Defines wire formats explicitly defined in spec or supported by the tool.
WorkflowSettings
Represents those settings applied to a generation workflow.
WorkflowSettings.Builder
WorkflowSettings builder static inner class.
